completion_summary: Resolved the cluster by grounding PL-011-073 as fully repealed history, PL-012-074 and PL-012-075 as current enactments requiring operative Title 5 treatment, PL-012-076 through PL-012-079 as unresolved source-limited records, PL-012-080 as superseded before codification, PL-012-081 as a statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 6567, and PL-012-082 as a current Title 10 amendment set that remains operative.

laws.title: Public Law 11-73 | Let Me Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: The chronology shows PL-011-073 as fully repealed, so it belongs only in repeal history.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Keep only a concise repeal-history note and remove the misanchored retained text.
source_evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-011-073/law.txt contains the acting-service rule and effective-date text.
audit/primary/batch-12-02.json classifies PL-011-073 as fully-repealed with historical-note-only treatment.
audit/final-ledger.json records the review conclusion as fully-repealed, and usc/usc22.xml carries the branch history note while origin/main does not carry the same note string.
laws.final_recommended_action: Keep only a concise repeal-history note and remove the misanchored retained text.

laws.title: Public Law 12-74 | Federal Bar Association Act of 2023
laws.chronology_conclusion: Sections 4 and 5 establish and govern a new Federal Bar Association, and no later repeal of the act was identified.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Create the new Title 5 organic provisions for the Federal Bar Association, its board, bylaws, seal, examination, membership, discipline, law-firm regulation, and immunity rules, and keep the repeal of PL-007-047 as history only.
source_evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-012-074/law.txt contains the short title, severability, repeal, and Title 5 organizational provisions.
audit/primary/batch-12-02.json and audit/final-ledger.json classify PL-012-074 as current and requiring new Title 5 codification for sections 4 and 5.
usc/usc05.xml carries the branch note, while origin/main does not yet show the needed positive-law Title 5 provisions.
laws.final_recommended_action: Create the new Title 5 provisions for sections 4 and 5 and keep the repeal history concise.

laws.title: Public Law 12-75 | Freedom of Information Common Sense Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Section 3 is a live amendment to 5 U.S.C. 552(a)(6)(A)(i)-(ii)(I), so the act remains current law.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Amend 5 U.S.C. 552(a)(6)(A)(i), (ii), and (ii)(I) with the source's replacement language and trim the note to concise history.
source_evidence: codification/laws/laws/PL-012-075/law.txt contains the FOIA response-time replacement text in section 3.
audit/claude-validation.json and audit/final-ledger.json classify PL-012-075 as current and a live amendment to 5 U.S.C. 552.
usc/usc02.xml carries the branch note, while origin/main does not show the same note string.
laws.final_recommended_action: Preserve the live FOIA amendment and keep only concise note history.

laws.title: Public Law 12-82 | Military Officer Commissioning Reform Act 2023
